name: Seitz Inc.

overview.summary: Seitz is a fifth-generation, family-owned German chemical company founded in 1885 by Heinrich Seitz in Frankfurt. Known for premium dry cleaning detergents (Frankotex line), innovative solvents (SENSENE™ modified-alcohol and DC Naturell® silicone), and a comprehensive spotting/pre-treatment system (Polysol, Polyspot). Their US subsidiary operates from Tampa, FL and manages North American distribution. Seitz serves professional dry cleaners, commercial laundries, hotels, hospitals, and fire departments across 68 countries.
overview.historyAndReputation: Heinrich Seitz founded the company as an aniline dyes factory in Frankfurt in 1885 at age 27. His brother Fritz joined two years later. The company survived near-total destruction in a 1944 air raid and rebuilt over five years. Relocated to Kriftel (near Frankfurt) in 1974. Five generations of the Seitz family have maintained a reputation for German precision engineering in textile care chemistry. DIN EN ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 14001:2015 certified.
overview.marketPosition: Premium tier, German engineering focus. Seitz competes directly with Kreussler in the high-end European/German textile care chemistry segment. Strong global presence (68 countries) but smaller US market share than domestic competitors like R.R. Street or A.L. Wilson. Differentiated by innovative solvent technology (SENSENE™) and comprehensive product systems.

specialties: Innovative solvents (SENSENE™ modified alcohol, DC Naturell® silicone, hydrocarbon)
Pre-spotting agents for multiple solvent systems

productLines.categoryDescription: Seitz offers or supports four distinct solvent technologies — more options than any other company profiled. This gives operators maximum flexibility to choose the solvent system that fits their market, regulations, and equipment.

products.name: SENSENE™
products.description: Modified-alcohol-based hybrid solvent that combines the cleaning power of perchloroethylene with the gentleness of hydrocarbon. Kauri Butanol (KB) value of 161, compared to less than 80 for most competitors — this means dramatically higher solvency power, dissolving more types of soil more effectively. No carcinogenic substances. Increased flash point for workplace safety. Developed in partnership with SAFECHEM/DOW.
fibers: all fibers — excellent on delicates due to combined solvent properties
products.proTips: SENSENE™'s KB value of 161 is the key number. Higher KB = more dissolving power. Perc is around 90, hydrocarbons around 25-30. SENSENE™ outperforms perc on soil removal while being gentler on fabrics. It's the best-of-both-worlds solvent but requires dedicated equipment.

products.name: DC Naturell®
products.description: Liquid silicone-based solvent — the most environmentally friendly option in Seitz's portfolio. Decomposes into environmentally neutral byproducts. Provides gentle cleaning for delicate garments.
notFor: heavily soiled items may need pre-treatment
products.proTips: DC Naturell® is Seitz's answer to GreenEarth D5. Similar silicone-based technology but within the Seitz product ecosystem. Best for shops marketing environmental responsibility.

products.name: Hydrocarbon solvent
products.description: Standard hydrocarbon solvent for dry cleaning. Used since 1993. Environmentally friendly with high safety and environmental standards.
products.proTips: Seitz's hydrocarbon option is their entry-level solvent. Pair with Frankotex KW detergent for optimal results.

products.name: intense®
products.description: Environmentally neutral solvent with no carcinogenic substances and increased flash point for safe workplace handling. Positioned between hydrocarbon and SENSENE™ in the Seitz solvent hierarchy.
usedFor: dry cleaning with enhanced safety profile
products.proTips: intense® is for shops that want better-than-hydrocarbon performance without the SENSENE™ equipment investment.

productLines.categoryDescription: The Frankotex line — Seitz's flagship detergent family. Different formulations for different solvent systems, with advanced features like scent systems, anti-static action, and retexturing.

products.name: Frankotex HCR
products.description: Dry cleaning detergent formulated for perchloroethylene-based systems. Provides soil removal, soil suspension, and garment care in perc.
products.proTips: Match your detergent to your solvent. Frankotex HCR is perc-specific — don't use in hydrocarbon.

products.name: Frankotex KW
products.description: Dry cleaning detergent for hydrocarbon-based systems.
products.proTips: Pair with Seitz hydrocarbon solvent for a fully integrated Seitz system.

products.name: Frankotex Fresh DF
products.description: Innovative hydrocarbon detergent with built-in fresh scent system, marked anti-static action, and retexturing additives. Flash point above 143°F. Results in almost crease-free garments, making finishing easier.
usedFor: hydrocarbon systems needing premium finish quality
products.proTips: The retexturing additives in Frankotex Fresh DF mean garments come out of the machine smoother and require less pressing. The scent system means no need for separate deodorizing. This is the premium hydrocarbon detergent option.

products.name: Mega Power Powder + Viva Power Fluid
products.description: Two-component concentrated detergent system — powder and liquid work together or independently. Low dosing required due to high concentration. Viva Power Fluid kills microorganisms without pH disruption and prevents textile wear and fade. Effective at 60°C wash temperature.
products.proTips: The two-component approach lets you adjust the powder-to-liquid ratio based on soil level. Heavy soil: more powder. Light soil: more fluid. This flexibility makes it cost-effective for variable workloads.

productLines.categoryDescription: Seitz offers system-specific pre-spotters — different formulations optimized for perc vs. hydrocarbon solvent compatibility. Applied before machine cleaning to boost stain removal.

products.name: Polysol RAN
products.description: Light-colored, fluid pre-spotter for all stain types — both wet-bound and grease-bound soiling. Non-irritating to skin. Safe for colored and white textiles. Water-soluble (can be diluted 1:1-2 with water). Works in all spraying systems. For perchloroethylene-based dry cleaning.
usedFor: all stain types in perc systems
fibers: all fabrics including colored — safe formulation
products.proTips: Polysol RAN is a universal pre-spotter — it handles both wet and dry side stains, which means fewer bottles and faster processing. The water-dilution option lets you adjust concentration for light vs. heavy soiling.

products.name: Polyspot KWV
products.description: Pre-spotter formulated specifically for hydrocarbon solvents. Particularly effective on stubborn staining and ground-in soil. Loosens and softens both water-based and fat-based soiling. Ideal for collars, sleeve linings, cuffs, pockets, sportswear, and weather-protective clothing.
products.proTips: Polyspot KWV is especially effective on the combination soil found on sportswear and outerwear — body oils mixed with environmental dirt. Apply to problem areas, load, and let the hydrocarbon cycle do the rest.

products.name: V1
products.description: Perc-based post-spotting agent for solvent-soluble stains: paint, lacquer, adhesives, smear, ballpoint pen, tar, nail polish, lipstick, ink, and grease-bound stains. Works as both pre- and post-spotter.
products.proTips: V1 is the Seitz POG equivalent. Use for dry-side stains that survive machine cleaning — the solvent base dissolves what water-based chemistry can't touch.
products.alternativeTo: R.R. Street PICRIN®, A.L. Wilson TarGo Dry®

productLines.categoryDescription: Seitz's Viva Care system for professional wet cleaning of dry-clean-only garments.

products.name: Viva Care system
products.description: Complete wet cleaning system including detergent, conditioner, and finishing products. Designed for professional wet cleaning of garments labeled dry-clean-only.
products.proTips: Viva Care is Seitz's answer to Kreussler's Lanadol. Pair with compatible wet cleaning equipment for best results.
products.alternativeTo: Kreussler LANADOL system, R.R. Street H2PRO®

agentMapping.NSD: Frankotex HCR (perc detergent), Frankotex KW (HC detergent), Frankotex Fresh DF (premium HC)
agentMapping.protein: Polysol RAN (universal — handles protein stains among others in perc)
agentMapping.tannin: Polysol RAN (universal — handles tannin among others), Polyspot KWV (for HC)
agentMapping.leveling: Referenced in product line but specific product not identified by name
agentMapping.rustRemover: Not identified in current public product line
agentMapping.enzymatic: Referenced but specific product not identified by name
agentMapping.solvent: SENSENE™ (modified alcohol, KB 161), DC Naturell® (silicone), hydrocarbon, intense® (enhanced safety), plus perc compatibility

fiberExpertise.silk: SENSENE™ provides excellent silk cleaning due to combined lipophilic + hydrophilic solvency. Polysol RAN is safe for colored silks. DC Naturell® (silicone) is extremely gentle for silk. Viva Care system available for silk wet cleaning.
fiberExpertise.wool: Similar to silk — SENSENE™ and DC Naturell® are safe for wool. Viva Care wet cleaning system handles wool professionally.
fiberExpertise.leather: Not a primary focus. Refer to Kreussler (LANADOL LICKER) or Royaltone for leather-specific chemistry.
fiberExpertise.synthetics: Full product line compatible. SENSENE™'s high KB value means better soil removal from synthetic fibers that can trap body oils.
fiberExpertise.delicates: Seitz's multi-solvent approach means they can match solvent gentleness to fabric sensitivity. DC Naturell® for the most delicate items, SENSENE™ for delicates that need more cleaning power, hydrocarbon for standard delicates.

protocols.name: SENSENE™ High-Performance Cleaning
protocols.description: Use SENSENE™ solvent with Frankotex detergent for maximum soil removal on garments that would be cleaned in perc but need a non-carcinogenic alternative. SENSENE™'s KB value of 161 means it outperforms perc on many soil types. Pre-spot with Polysol RAN for problem areas.
protocols.usedFor: High-performance dry cleaning as perc alternative

protocols.name: Seitz Pre-Spot and Clean (Hydrocarbon)
protocols.description: Apply Polyspot KWV to collars, cuffs, and soiled areas. Load garments with Frankotex KW or Frankotex Fresh DF detergent. The pre-spotter loosens both water and fat-based soils, the detergent carries them away. Frankotex Fresh DF adds scent and anti-static for a premium finish.
protocols.usedFor: Standard hydrocarbon dry cleaning with premium results

distributionNetwork.distributionMethod: through authorized distributors globally, direct through Tampa office for US
distributionNetwork.howToBuy: Contact Seitz, The Fresher Company, Inc. in Tampa, FL for US sales. Products also available through dry cleaning supply distributors: FabriClean Supply, CleanersOutlet.com, and regional distributors.

strengthsKnownFor: SENSENE™ — highest KB value (161) of any non-perc solvent, outperforms perc on many soil types
140+ years of German precision in textile care chemistry
Four distinct solvent options (SENSENE, DC Naturell, hydrocarbon, intense) — most flexibility of any supplier
Comprehensive pre-spotting system matched to solvent type
limitations: Smaller US market presence compared to domestic competitors (Street's, A.L. Wilson)
Less granular spotting agent lineup than A.L. Wilson or Kreussler (relies on universal pre-spotters rather than stain-specific agents)
Limited public product detail for some categories (enzymatic, leveling, finishing)
German parent company focus may mean slower US market response
industryReputation.whoUsesThem: Quality-focused operators who want premium German chemistry. Shops considering solvent transition (multiple solvent options from one supplier). Cleaners processing high-end garments who want alternatives to perc. Operations in markets where environmental regulations restrict traditional solvents. Hotels, hospitals, and fire departments needing commercial-grade textile care.

education.trainingResources: Staff training programs covering professional textile care, cleaning techniques, environmental protection, and efficiency. Theoretical and practical instruction.
education.technicalSupport: On-site competent employee analysis of customer operations. Individual target assessment and custom solution development. Ongoing implementation support and monitoring.
education.publications: Product technical documentation. Available through Seitz website and distributors.

gonrIntegration.relevance: Seitz's SENSENE™ solvent represents the cutting edge of non-perc dry cleaning technology. When GONR protocols note that professional dry cleaning is recommended and the operator wants the highest cleaning performance without perc's health risks, SENSENE™ is the answer. Seitz's multi-solvent flexibility also means GONR can recommend a Seitz system regardless of what solvent the operator runs.
gonrIntegration.agentCrossReference: When a GONR protocol calls for: dry cleaning solvent → SENSENE™ (highest performance), DC Naturell® (gentlest), or hydrocarbon (standard); dry cleaning detergent → Frankotex HCR (perc), KW (HC), or Fresh DF (premium HC); pre-treatment → Polysol RAN (perc) or Polyspot KWV (HC); POG → V1; wet cleaning → Viva Care system.
gonrIntegration.whenToRecommend: Recommend Seitz when: the operator needs maximum cleaning power without perc (SENSENE™ KB 161); the shop is evaluating solvent options (Seitz covers all four major types); the operation serves high-end clients who expect premium results; or environmental regulations restrict traditional solvents and the shop needs a compliant, high-performance alternative.
